description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust metal slide and frame. The grip is textured and contoured for ergonomic handling, with a circular emblem embedded on each side. The trigger guard is rounded and slightly undercut, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of standard length, with a visible muzzle and a recessed crown, and the slide has subtle serrations for improved grip during operation. Minimal external markings are present, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, contributing to a streamlined profile.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, rounded trigger guard, and a flat magazine base. The design is sleek and functional, with minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, textured grip with emblem, and slide serrations.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle opening and barrel crown.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, slide, and ejection port.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the hammer, rear sight, and backstrap of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a slight palm swell and features a textured, checkered pattern for enhanced traction. It is primarily black with a circular emblem embedded on each side, likely representing a manufacturer or model logo. The grip panels appear to be made of a durable polymer or rubberized material, providing both comfort and slip resistance. There are no visible finger grooves, but the backstrap is gently curved for ergonomic support. The overall design is functional and understated, with minimal embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth finish and a slight undercut at the rear to facilitate a higher grip. It is of standard size, providing ample space for finger placement, and lacks any aggressive texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and practical, with no integrated accessories or squared-off edges.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and profile, with a visible recessed crown at the muzzle. It is not threaded, ported, or fluted, and there are no external compensators or suppressor threads. The finish matches the rest of the handgun, with a matte black appearance and no visible markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features minimal external markings, with only subtle serrations at the rear for improved grip during slide manipulation. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide surfaces in the provided views. The overall appearance is clean and unadorned.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, contributing to a streamlined and compact profile. There are no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests, and the baseplate appears smooth with no additional texturing or logos. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing concealability and ease of carry.
